inlineContent.text: The tokens it exposes cannot be overriden as these colors are strongly related to the Orange brand.
If you think you need to overide some colors or have your own set of colors, start a new discussion (https://github.com/Orange-OpenSource/ouds-ios/discussions/categories/q-a).

abstract.text: Protocol to add to any semantic or component tokens provider so as to be gather with all providers and given to the theme for initialization
The Orange Business Tools theme is dedicated to applications with strong dimensions constraints.
Something which provides all semantic tokens of colors charts
